mnemonics.title: FCR - Three Main Types
mnemonics.content: Feedforward (no loops), Convolutional (spatial patterns), Recurrent (sequential memory) - the three fundamental NN architectures.

mnemonics.title: CNN = See, RNN = Sequence
mnemonics.content: CNN sees images (spatial). RNN remembers sequences (temporal). Match the data type to the network type.

mnemonics.title: LSTM Gates
mnemonics.content: Input gate (what to add), Forget gate (what to remove), Output gate (what to pass). Three gates control LSTM's memory.

mnemonics.title: GAN = Counterfeiter vs Detective
mnemonics.content: Generator = Counterfeiter (makes fakes). Discriminator = Detective (spots fakes). Both improve through competition.

mnemonics.title: Auto = Self-encoding
mnemonics.content: Autoencoder: Encode (compress) -> Bottleneck (compressed representation) -> Decode (reconstruct). Learns efficient data representations.
